title: scutellaria aurantiaca
intro: Scutellaria aurantiaca, also known as Orange Skullcap, is a perennial plant species belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antispasmodic activities. The health benefits of Scutellaria aurantiaca include its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and can also be used in essential oil form, which is often used to calm the mind and promote relaxation.
